title: Comms type drift: fix longstanding tsc errors in src/comms (no runtime impact)
description:
Surfaced during the test-debt epic (jw0 / tick 5mf) by npx tsc --noEmit — pre-existing type errors that vitest/esbuild does not catch and pnpm test does not exercise:
- cloud-unit.test.ts: missing afterEach import (3x TS2304)
- cloud.ts: TS2345 x2 (lines ~336/362), TS2678 at ~614 (tick_created not in the message union), TS2353 at ~819 (ContextFailedEvent)
- mock.ts:75: TS2420 interface mismatch
These suggest drift between the comms message unions (src/comms/types.ts) and call sites. Fix the types (or the unions, where the union is the stale side — check against the Go server message shapes in internal/tickboard/server and the cloud worker), then make npx tsc --noEmit clean for src/comms/. Consider adding a typecheck script + CI step in a follow-up if cheap.
Files: internal/tickboard/ui/src/comms/*.ts. Run: cd internal/tickboard/ui && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm test
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit reports no errors in src/comms; pnpm test still 433 passed / 69 skipped
